title: Single Banana Image
text: Describe the image precisely in UTF-8 text. Include required visible text, composition, style, aspect ratio, and negative constraints.

extra_fields.visual_elements: List the core objects, layout zones, typography, colors, and texture.
extra_fields.visual_focus: State the most important visual result.
extra_fields.layout: State the canvas ratio and layout, such as 9:16 vertical single-page poster.
extra_fields.reference_material_url: Optional Banana material URL from projects get after material upload.
